subtitle.ja: 両手首に糸を通して始めます。右手で左手首向こうの糸を持ち、左手首に1回巻きます
subtitle.en: Begin with the strings passing over both wrists. With the right hand, grasp the far wrist string of the left hand and wind it once around the left wrist.

subtitle.ja: 左手で右手首手前の糸を持ち、右手首に1回巻きます
subtitle.en: With the left hand, grasp the near wrist string of the right hand and wind it once around the right wrist.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指と小指で、反対側の手首の糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With the thumbs and little fingers of both hands, pick up from below the wrist strings of the opposite hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、反対側の手のひらの糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up from below the palm strings of the opposite hands.

subtitle.ja: 両手を合わせて糸を押さえ、手を下に向けて手首の糸を全て落とします。両手を開いて完成です
subtitle.en: Bring the hands together to hold the strings, turn the hands downward and let all the wrist strings fall. Open the hands, and this completes the figure.

subtitle.ja: 手のひらの向きを、手前側と向こう側に交互に回すとはたおり機が動きます
subtitle.en: By alternately turning the palms toward yourself and away, the loom will begin to move.
